articles.title: Iran's intelligence minister Esmail Khatib killed in air strike
articles.summary: Israel said it had killed Khatib, whose death was confirmed by Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Wednesday.

articles.title: 'Very difficult to stop': BBC visits scene of Iran cluster bomb strike on Israel

articles.title: Russian archaeologist can be sent to Ukraine for trial, Polish judge rules

articles.title: Forty years after the last one was poached rhinos are back in the wild in Uganda
articles.summary: Hunting for the horns and meat, Ugandan poachers once wiped out the southern white rhinos from the country.

articles.title: Oil nears $110 a barrel after gas field strike
articles.summary: Iran's military warned it would take "decisive action" in response to the strike on its energy infrastructure.

articles.title: US judge orders Trump administration to reopen Voice of America
articles.summary: Some 85% of VOA staff were laid off by Trump who accused the international broadcaster of bias.

articles.title: King Charles greets Nigerian president in Windsor sunshine
articles.summary: The King and President Tinubu will give speeches later at the state banquet, to be attended by political leaders and celebrities.

articles.title: Quantum pioneers win Turing Award for encryption breakthrough
